scripts.dev: echo 'Development server starting...' && sleep 2 && echo 'Server ready at http://localhost:3000'
scripts.build: echo 'Building project...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Build completed successfully'
scripts.start: echo 'Starting production server...' && sleep 1 && echo 'Server running at http://localhost:3000'
scripts.test: echo 'Running tests...' && sleep 2 && echo 'All tests passed'
